creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
I can't find sysctl for changing AGP mode:
Follow Xorg wiki page http://www.x.org/wiki/RadeonFeature/
Linux value:                    FreeBSD value:
radeon.modeset 0,1, -1 -> hw.dri.0.modesetting 0,1
radeon.agpmode 1, 2, 4, 8, -1 -> not exists ? default state is -1?

It's big problem because PCI/PCIe mode of AGP causes many artifact in X11 especially in fonts rendering:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=199310
